content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Cait: Fuck yeah, MJR! Blowin' those raider bitches apart gets me so goddamn wet. Look at their tits hangin' out those shredded leather straps - serves 'em right for tryin' to rape what's mine. Slim: Heh, always love watchin' you work, boss. Those dumb cunts thought they could take you? Bet their pussies are still twitchin' in death. Cait: Damn right! And speaking of twitchin' - Slim, you ghoul fuck, you still pushin' that Jet laced with FEV? Heard some junkie in Bunker Hill fucked a radroach after huffin' your shit. Slim: Hey now, free market, baby. If some smoothskin wants to ruin their life suckin' off a molerat, that's their patriotic right. Unlike you Brotherhood bootlickers tryin' to regulate my fuckin' hustle. Cait: Brotherhood's got the right idea - purge the mutants, burn the synths, and put up a goddamn wall around Diamond City. Fuckin' Piper would have us all hold hands with Supermutants while they skull-fuck our kids. Slim: Pfft, you trad-wives are all the same - preachin' purity while beggin' for a Deathclaw's knot. Saw you eyein' that assaultron's vibrator function last week. Cait: I'll shove that vibrator up your rotten ghoul ass, you walking corpse! MJR's the only machine I need - his VATS-assisted thrusts hit the right spots every damn time.
